overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime stroll through a rain-slicked futuristic metropolis. The player character walks from a covered pedestrian arcade past a towering holographic dragon installation and into dense urban corridors lined with vertical digital billboards and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath transit overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered pedestrian zone beneath an overpass, passing illuminated vertical billboards on the left

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure covering the pedestrian walkway with metal support beams
tall illuminated advertising screens displaying various commercial content on the left wall
metal barrier separating the pedestrian walkway from the adjacent street level
rain-slicked tiled ground reflecting the neon lights from surrounding signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive transit overpass. The camera moves forward past towering vertical digital billboards on the left that cast colorful neon reflections onto the wet pavement. The space is sheltered from weather, with the overpass structure dominating the overhead view and metal railings lining the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with holographic art installation

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with visible sky and cherry blossom trees
approaches large holographic dragon pillar installation in the plaza center

agents.ego_description: walking toward a massive holographic dragon display while crossing an open plaza area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright clothing walking ahead toward the dragon installation

entered.detail: tall cylindrical display projecting a glowing cyan holographic dragon wrapped around the structure
enclosed transparent walkway connecting buildings overhead with illuminated interior
tree with pink blossoms providing sparse vegetation in the urban plaza
painted white lines marking the pedestrian crossing area on the plaza floor

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a spacious plaza with partial sky visibility. A massive holographic dragon pillar dominates the center distance, glowing with cyan light. Overhead, a glass-enclosed pedestrian bridge spans between buildings, while cherry blossom trees add touches of nature to the left. The camera approaches the dragon installation while following other pedestrians crossing the open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass with adjacent roadway and traffic

events.description: turns right to observe traffic passing on the adjacent street below
futuristic black sports car drives past on the wet street to the right

agents.ego_description: pausing briefly to observe the holographic dragon up close before turning to watch vehicles pass on the street

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car driving along the wet road with headlights illuminating the pavement

entered.detail: large circular purple neon sign with 'BRAIN WASH' text mounted on building facade
ground floor commercial establishments with illuminated windows and signage
elevated highway or monorail track casting shadows over the pedestrian area

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the holographic dragon pillar on the left, revealing the full scale of the glowing installation. Turning right, the view opens to an adjacent street where a futuristic sports car drives past on the wet asphalt. The 'BRAIN WASH' neon sign glows purple in the distance, while overhead transit structures provide partial cover. The segment captures the transition from plaza to street-level urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with vertical digital signage

events.description: enters narrow urban canyon with towering buildings covered in dense vertical billboards
tilts camera upward to view the towering building facades covered in advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow neon-lit corridor and looking up at the towering digital billboards overhead

entered.detail: tall building facades completely covered with multiple layers of glowing digital billboards and advertisements
high-rise structures with mixed commercial and residential lighting visible through windows
ground level shop entrances with neon trim and illuminated display windows

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a narrow urban canyon where towering buildings are completely covered in dense vertical digital signage. The camera walks forward beneath overpassing structures, passing empty storefronts on the left. The environment is enclosed and sheltered, with neon light reflecting off every wet surface. The camera tilts upward to capture the overwhelming density of advertisements covering the building facades overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered pedestrian arcade into the overwhelming neon density of a futuristic urban canyon. It begins beneath a massive transit overpass, moving past towering digital billboards that cast colorful reflections onto the wet pavement. As the camera emerges from the covered walkway, the space opens into a wide plaza featuring cherry blossom trees and a massive, glowing cyan holographic dragon pillar. The scene then shifts toward the street level, passing the dragon installation to reveal a futuristic sports car gliding across wet asphalt beneath a purple neon sign. Finally, the camera enters a narrow urban corridor where the view tilts upward to capture towering buildings completely shrouded in dense vertical advertisements and glowing signage.
